summary: Backend-only testing for Servall Nexus ERP. All 35 pytest cases passed covering auth (4 demo accounts + invalid creds), dashboard stats, products CRUD + stock adjust + bulk margin, vendors, franchises, full indent lifecycle (create -> approve -> dispatch -> deliver -> DC + invoice generation), RBAC (franchise_manager 403 on audit logs and cross-franchise indent), aging report, cycle counts (generate + submit with variance), and PO auto-generation.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 when Authorization header missing (FastAPI HTTPBearer default). Cosmetic; semantics fine.
Heavy: iterates every product calling find_one per stock lookup (N+1). OK for 20 products but will degrade at scale; recommend an aggregation pipeline.
Same N+1 pattern (stock lookups per product). Consider $lookup.

No role restriction — any authenticated user (including franchise_manager of other franchise) can mark an indent delivered. Recommend require_roles(super_admin, warehouse_manager, franchise_manager) + franchise ownership check.
Form parameter ordering: request param defaults to None and there is no path-level validation that DB write before audit log succeeded. Works but fragile.

action_items: Add role restriction to POST /api/indents/{id}/deliver (currently open to any authenticated user including unrelated franchise_managers).
Optimize /api/products and /api/dashboard/stats N+1 stock lookups via aggregation pipelines for scale.
Optional: standardize 'no token' response to 401 (currently 403) for better client UX.
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC gap: /api/indents/{id}/deliver lacks require_roles — a franchise_manager could deliver another franchise's indent and inflate their stock. HIGH priority.
server.py is 1020 lines; consider splitting into modules (auth, products, indents, reports, ocr) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Seed runs on every startup; idempotency relies on email/code lookups which is fine, but logged 'Starting' message could be guarded.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded everywhere via projections.
Env vars (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME) used without defaults (good fail-fast).
test_credentials: All 4 demo accounts from /app/memory/test_credentials.md verified working: admin@servall.com/Admin@123, accountant@servall.com/Accountant@123, warehouse@servall.com/Warehouse@123, franchise@servall.com/Franchise@123
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed products/vendors/franchises (not cleaned up; counts use >= for idempotency). One indent went through full lifecycle to delivered+invoice.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 35 backend tests are green via `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. OCR upload endpoint /api/invoices/upload was not tested (requires a real PDF/image and Gemini call). RBAC gap on /api/indents/{id}/deliver is unverified by tests — may want to add a negative test once main agent fixes it.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The only behavioral gap is missing RBAC on the deliver endpoint; mitigation = add `require_roles('super_admin','warehouse_manager','franchise_manager')` plus franchise_id ownership check for franchise_manager.
